backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the JIVATRA/DKAN home appliance repair backend; handles bookings, user profiles, service management, site settings, and role-based access control via an AccessControl mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features — fixing booking submission error/success messaging and adding bilingual translation strings — to their respective source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing recent fixes to translations, styling, booking form error handling, and component contrast.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property color tokens for light and dark themes, plus base border and background body styles.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA with SEO meta tags, Open Graph tags, and Google Fonts preconnect links targeting the DKAN Enterprises Kanpur electronics repair brand.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that sets up TanStack Router with home and admin routes, wraps the app in QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and LanguageProvider, and renders the Navbar/Footer layout shell.
frontend/src/components/AdminPasswordGat: Two-step admin authentication component that first verifies a hardcoded password then requires Internet Identity login before granting access to the admin dashboard.
frontend/src/components/BookingForm.tsx: A multi-field React form component for creating appliance repair bookings, supporting Hindi/English languages, UP district/state selection, service type and time slot options, with error handling and success state via React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Displays a contact section with phone, address, hours, and email details fetched from backend settings, including a WhatsApp CTA button and loading skeletons, with bilingual support.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand info, SevaMitra badge, UP Government authorization badge, quick navigation links, and dynamic contact details fetched from settings, with bilingual support.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section displaying the DKAN Enterprises brand, UP Government authorization badge, SevaMitra badge, key stats, and CTA buttons for booking and contact, with Hindi/English language toggle.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with the DKAN logo, desktop and mobile nav links, a language toggle button, and an admin link, hiding nav items when on the admin route.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays a grid of appliance repair service cards fetched from the backend, falling back to static data if empty, with dynamic icons, color theming, loading skeletons, and bilingual labels.
frontend/src/components/SevaMitraBadge.t: Renders a badge/button linking to the UP SevaMitra app on Google Play Store in three display variants (hero, footer, inline) with bilingual (Hindi/English) labels.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Displays a grid of six hardcoded customer testimonials with star ratings, reviewer names, locations, and service types for DKAN Enterprises.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Renders a fixed floating WhatsApp contact button linking to a specific phone number, with a bilingual label and animated styling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useLanguage.ts: Provides a language context (Hindi/English) with localStorage persistence and a toggle function, exposing the current language via the useLanguage hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend CRUD operations including bookings, services, and settings, each using the actor from useActor and invalidating relevant caches on mutation success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Poppins and Noto Sans Devanagari fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a DKAN blue-green OKLCH color theme with light/dark mode CSS variables and custom utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays and manages bookings, services, and settings using React Query hooks, with support for status updates, service CRUD, and Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page component that composes Hero, Services, BookingForm, Testimonials, Contact, and WhatsAppButton sections into the main layout.
frontend/src/translations.ts: Bilingual (Hindi/English) translation strings for all UI text across navigation, hero, services, and booking form sections, exported as a typed translations object.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with OKLCH-based color tokens (navy, electric-green, teal), custom fonts, border radii, shadows, and animations including accordion and pulse-green keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features and pending tasks, currently focused on fixing booking form error/success message display in both Hindi and English, and ensuring the backend returns proper error variants.
